creator: doctor@doctor.nl2k.ab.ca
text: Total surprise.  Lookslike bhyve is running very slowly and is taking resources from other services.  I was running bhyve under 11 and 10 no major issues.  I have upgraded to 12 and am running into issues such as server slow performance, virtual machine slow performance , cpu errors from virtual servers under bhyve. Cannot install new bhyve virtual servers due to memory errors.  How can this happen?  I am ready to help debug the issue very cautiously .  Running FreeBSD 12.0 on ufs 2 6-core 1.70 GHz Xeon CPUs and 16 GB RAM.
